title: phacelia integrifolia var. arenicola
intro: Phacelia integrifolia var. arenicola, also known as sand phacelia or desert phacelia, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phacelia integrifolia var. arenicola include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Phacelia integrifolia var. arenicola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
